query:
SELECT 
  bi.externalId,
  bi.contactName,
  bi.description,
  bi.lineAmount,
  bi.invoiceDate,
  s.externalId AS serviceId,
  s.planName
FROM billing_items bi
LEFT JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.billingItemExternalId = bi.externalId
LEFT JOIN services s ON s.externalId = sba.serviceExternalId
WHERE bi.description LIKE '%# Rental%' 
   OR bi.description LIKE '%Number Rental%'
   OR bi.description LIKE '%DID%'
ORDER BY bi.contactName, bi.lineAmount DESC
LIMIT 20;

  s.planName
FROM billing_items bi
LEFT JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.billingItemExternalId = bi.externalId
LEFT JOIN services s ON s.externalId = sba.serviceExternalId
WHERE bi.description LIKE '%# Rental%' 
   OR bi.description LIKE '%Number Rental%'
   OR bi.description LIKE '%DID%'
ORDER BY bi.contactName, bi.lineAmount DESC
LIMIT 20;
